title: chromolaena suratensis
intro: Chromolaena suratensis, also known as Lantana camara or white sage, is a shrub-like plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help treat various health issues. The health benefits of Chromolaena suratensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as an antiseptic, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various herbal preparations.
